overview: Sri Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences (AITS), Rajampet, operates under the Annamacharya educational framework and is known for active placement drives, autonomous academic structure, and strong regional industry engagement.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹60,000 – ₹68,000 per year under Convenor Quota. Management quota fees vary by branch.

placements.companiesVisited: Sutherland Global Services, TCS, Hexaware, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through Andhra Pradesh state counseling and institutional quota admissions.
admissions.importantDates: Follows APSCHE admission and counseling timelines.

campus.area: Large autonomous engineering campus in Rajampet
campus.specialNote: Hostel & Mess combined fee ranges from ₹65,000 – ₹85,000 annually.

contact.address: Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences, New Boyanapalli, Rajampet, Kadapa District, Andhra Pradesh-516126

hostel.note: Separate residential layouts are provided for boys and girls.

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: State reimbursement pathways for qualifying lower-income groups.
